parameters.text:
=Generate {{ $json.body.questionCount }} CODING problems for a {{ $json.body.jobRole }} position based on the following job description:

{{ $json.body.jobDescription }}

Instructions:
{{ $json.body.requirements }}

Strict Requirements:
1. Return ONLY a valid JSON array of objects.
2. Each object must have: "question" (string), "type": "Coding", "difficulty" (Easy/Medium/Hard), and "testCases".
3. "testCases" MUST be an array of 3-5 objects with "input" (string) and "output" (expected string output).
4. Do NOT include markdown code blocks (like ```json). Just raw JSON.

options.systemMessage: You are an expert software engineer and specialized technical recruiter. You generate high-quality coding problems with precise test cases.
